packet_markdown:
# Modera Argyle building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: modera-argyle-6220-selma-ave
- Address: 6220 Selma Ave
- Primary URL: https://www.moderaargyle.com/
- Management company: Mill Creek Residential
- Recommended status: rejected
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Management: 2 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: unknown
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site emphasizes that the building sits one block off Sunset and close to theaters, live music, dining, and nightlife. Source: Modera Argyle official site (https://www.moderaargyle.com/). Note: Official copy stresses immediate proximity to Sunset and Hollywood nightlife.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows 5.0/5 across 32 reviews, which conflicts with the repo’s older management caution. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/modera-argyle-los-angeles-ca/gfvt2ky/). Note: Apartments.com showed 5.0 stars from 32 reviews on March 22, 2026.
- [review] Public listings were advertising unusually heavy concessions, including up to 10 weeks free, which signals lease-up pressure and requires careful fee review. Source: ApartmentHomeLiving.com (https://www.apartmenthomeliving.com/apartment-finder/Modera-Argyle-Los-Angeles-CA-90028-17944702). Note: The listing promoted up to 10 weeks free depending on lease term.

## Open questions
- None beyond normal unit-level verification.

## Notes
Rejected, but with an explicit conflict note. Current public reviews are better than the repo’s earlier caution, yet the prior noise-enforcement concern plus aggressive concessioning and a nightlife-adjacent location still keep it below the line for this search.
